message:
perf(search/canonicalize): use eq_ignore_ascii_case, drop lowercase alloc (wyph3)

Follow-up to ppy2e (bda55821). canonicalize_fast_path's low-signal filter
previously allocated a fresh lowercase String for every non-empty input just
to compare against the 15 LOW_SIGNAL_CONTENT patterns. Replace with
str::eq_ignore_ascii_case which case-folds inline byte-by-byte — zero heap
allocation, byte-identical semantics on ASCII.

rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_pane2 cargo test
--lib search::canonicalize: 28/28 tests pass (including all 23 cases in
canonicalize_fast_path_matches_slow_path_for_pure_ascii_inputs covering
OK/ok/Done./got it/Thanks/thank you. plus markdown/non-ASCII/emoji).

Closes coding_agent_session_search-wyph3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
